prompt:
Goal: Create a dreamy vertical Japanese flower-language poster featuring a beautiful young woman surrounded by white lilies, with an ethereal romantic fantasy mood.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 composition, 768×1152 style, soft-focus cinematic lighting, pale lavender, blush pink, pearl white, and misty silver color palette.

Subject details: A delicate young woman with dark brown long glossy hair, straight bangs, and loose flowing side strands. She wears a translucent white, shimmering, sleeveless dress with tiny blue crystal-like embroidery and a gauzy bridal veil drifting behind her. Add long dangling earrings with blue teardrop gemstones and a fine sparkling necklace. Her right hand is raised gracefully near her collarbone with elegant fingers. Cover the central face area with a flat opaque muted rose-brown square, as if anonymized, while leaving hair, ears, neck, shoulders, jewelry, and pose visible.

Floral setting: Surround her with luminous white lilies. Show exactly 5 prominent lily elements: 1 large foreground lily at bottom right, 1 partially visible foreground lily beneath it, 1 large soft-focus lily behind the right side of her head, 1 pale lily near the upper right edge, and 1 blurred lily shape in the lower foreground. Add scattered white petals floating through the air, glowing dust motes, and bokeh sparkles.

Layout: Place Japanese typography mainly on the left side, using elegant white Mincho-style serif calligraphy. The headline occupies the upper-left quadrant, with an oversized numeral. A small flower-language information block sits beneath the headline with thin decorative vertical and horizontal line markers. A poetic body text block sits in the lower-left quadrant. Keep the subject centered-right and the flowers framing her, with dreamy depth of field.

Text content: Use exactly 3 visible text groups. Text group 1, large headline in the upper left: 「私が
1番
可愛い」 with the 「1」 very large. Text group 2, small flower-language block: 「選ばれた花
ユリ（百合）

花言葉
『純潔』『威厳』
『甘美』『無垢』」. Text group 3, lower-left poem: 「誰よりも見られたくて、
誰よりも愛されたくて、
私はこの美しさに
神様のような孤独を知った。

見惚れるなら、跪きなさい。
心まで奪ってあげるから。

だって私は、
私が一番、可愛いのだから。」

Visual style: Ultra-detailed anime-realistic fantasy portrait, soft skin glow, glossy hair highlights, translucent fabric, pearlescent lily petals, pastel haze, romantic backlight, shallow depth of field, luxurious social-media poster aesthetic.

Constraints: No extra English text, no logo, no watermark, preserve the Japanese text exactly, keep the face-covering square centered over the face, and maintain a refined flower-language theme for lily.
